title: MiniMag shoulder-launched proton torpedo launcher

The '''MiniMag shoulder-launched proton torpedo launcher''', also known as the '''MiniMag PTL missile launcher''' or simply the '''MiniMag''', was a model of portable [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]] manufactured by [[Krupx Munitions/Legends|Krupx Munitions]].

==Description==
Like the [[PLX-1/Legends|PLX-1 portable missile launcher]], the MiniMag shoulder-launched proton torpedo launcher's firing chamber was specifically designed for [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] (hence the acronym), though it was capable of firing other ordnance. Unlike the PLX, however, the PTL did not support multiple firing settings or launch torpedoes in the 'smart' Gravity-Activated Mode.<ref name="Battlefront">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''</ref> The PTL had a capacity for seven missiles.<ref name="BF I guide" />

==History==
Produced by [[Krupx Munitions/Legends|Krupx Munitions]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the MiniMag remained in production for many [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]].<ref name="MiniMag" /> It was used by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the aformentioned conflict.<ref name="MiniMag PTL missile launcher" /> A pair of MiniMags were used by the Republic-backed [[Upland Liberation Front]] during the concurrent [[Summertime War]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" /> They were also carried by [[Imperial shock trooper/Legends|Imperial shock troopers]] and [[Imperial Marines/Legends|Imperial Marines]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Battlefront II">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The MiniMag shoulder-launched proton torpedo launcher first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']], written by [[Matthew Stover]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" />

The PTL serves as the primary weapon for the Imperial's heavy-weapons class in the ''[[Battlefront]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series.
